title: GlioHyper: Glioma Biopsy Hyperspectral Dataset
author: Giannoni, Luca
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: A dataset of glioma biopsies which were examined using hyperspectral imaging. The details of the acquisition protocol and description of the data are provided in the accompaniying paper: "A transportable hyperspectral imaging setup based on fast, high-density spectral scanning for in situ quantitative biochemical mapping of fresh tissue biopsies", Luca Giannoni et. al.
